new_words.definition: 表示特定音高和时值的音乐符号，是音乐的基本构成单位
new_words.example: C, D, E, F, G, A, B are the 7 natural notes

new_words.definition: 音乐中规律性重复的基本时间单位，就像心跳的节律
new_words.example: A 4/4 time signature has 4 beats per measure

new_words.definition: 音乐演奏的快慢，用 BPM（每分钟拍数）表示
new_words.example: 120 BPM is a common tempo; 60 BPM feels like a slow heartbeat

new_words.definition: 一系列音符按时间顺序排列形成的可识别音乐线条，歌曲的'主角'
new_words.example: The melody is what you hum when you remember a song

new_words.definition: 三个或更多不同音高的音符同时发声的组合
new_words.example: C major chord = C + E + G played together

new_words.definition: 音符时值长短和强弱的规律性排列模式
new_words.example: A drum kit primarily provides the rhythm in a band

new_words.definition: 封装了模板、逻辑和样式的可复用独立 UI 单元
new_words.example: <UserCard :name='user.name' @click='handleClick' />

new_words.definition: 父组件向子组件传递数据的机制，单向数据流
new_words.example: defineProps<{ title: string; count: number }>()

new_words.definition: 作为参数传给另一个函数、在某个时机被调用的函数
new_words.example: setTimeout(() => console.log('done'), 1000)  // arrow fn is the callback

new_words.definition: 允许不同软件互相通信的规范，前端主要通过 HTTP API 获取数据
new_words.example: const data = await fetch('/api/users').then(r => r.json())

new_words.definition: 不阻塞主线程、允许其他代码继续运行的操作方式
new_words.example: async function fetchUser(id) { return await api.get(`/users/${id}`) }

new_words.definition: 浏览器将 HTML 解析成树形结构的内存表示，JS 通过它操作页面
new_words.example: document.getElementById('app')  // access DOM node

new_words.definition: 带占位符变量的可复用提示结构，运行时填入具体值
new_words.example: template = PromptTemplate.from_template('Translate {text} to {language}')

new_words.definition: 将 LLM 原始文本响应转换为结构化数据（JSON、列表等）的组件
new_words.example:
parser = JsonOutputParser(pydantic_object=Recipe)
chain = prompt | llm | parser

new_words.definition: 将文本转化为固定维度数字向量的表示，语义相似的文本向量距离近
new_words.example:
embeddings = OpenAIEmbeddings()
vector = embeddings.embed_query('What is RAG?')

new_words.definition: 根据查询从知识库中找到相关文档的组件，是 RAG 架构的核心
new_words.example: retriever = vectorstore.as_retriever(search_kwargs={'k': 4})

new_words.definition: 存储文档嵌入向量并支持高效语义相似度搜索的专用数据库
new_words.example: db = Chroma.from_documents(docs, embedding=OpenAIEmbeddings())

new_words.definition: 在多轮对话中保存上下文历史，让模型记住之前的交流内容
new_words.example: memory = ConversationBufferMemory(return_messages=True)

new_words.definition: 将 PDF、网页、CSV 等各种格式文件转换为 LangChain Document 对象的工具
new_words.example:
loader = PyPDFLoader('report.pdf')
docs = loader.load()

new_words.definition: 将长文档切分成适合 LLM 上下文窗口大小的小块
new_words.example: splitter = RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter(chunk_size=1000, chunk_overlap=200)

new_sentences.definition: 邀请对方继续发言或开始做某件事
new_sentences.example: You wanted to share the test results? Please go ahead.

new_sentences.definition: 请求对方对某个观点或情况提供更多细节和解释
new_sentences.example: Could you elaborate on that performance issue you mentioned?

new_sentences.definition: 主动消除误解，对之前表述不够清晰的内容进行澄清
new_sentences.example: Let me clarify — I meant the staging environment, not production.

new_sentences.en: I'll get back to you on that.
new_sentences.zh: 关于这个我稍后回复你。
new_sentences.definition: 表示需要时间确认后再回答，不立即给出答案
new_sentences.example: I'll get back to you on that timeline after checking with the team.

new_sentences.definition: 表示对方的解释或逻辑是合理的、可以理解的
new_sentences.example: That makes sense. Using a queue would handle the load spikes.
